name: Garden Zucchini with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup Olive Oil, or Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease an 8-by-8-by-2-inch baking dish.
3. Scrub zucchini well with a stiff brush and cut crosswise into 1/4 inch slices.
4. In a medium bowl, combine flour with 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
5. Toss zucchini slices in seasoned flour to coat them well.
6. Slowly heat oil in a large, heavy skillet over low heat.
7. Saute zucchini until golden brown on each side for about 4 minutes total.
8. Drain excess oil from the skillet and transfer zucchini to the prepared baking dish.
9. Arrange tomato slices on top of the zucchini.
10. In a separate bowl, combine sour cream with remaining salt, dried oregano, and pepper. Spread evenly over tomato slices.
11. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese evenly over the mixture.
12. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the zucchini is tender.
